questions.question: What are the most common credit card complaints?
questions.expected_answer: Credit card complaints include billing disputes, fraud, and customer service issues

questions.question: Why are customers unhappy with money transfers?
questions.expected_answer: Money transfer complaints include delays, fraud, and failed transactions

questions.question: What issues do customers face with personal loans?
questions.expected_answer: Personal loan complaints include interest rates, fees, and billing disputes

questions.question: Tell me about fees complaints across all products
questions.expected_answer: Fees are a common complaint across credit cards, savings accounts, and personal loans

questions.question: What are the fraud-related complaints?
questions.expected_answer: Fraud complaints include unauthorized transactions, identity theft, and suspicious charges

questions.question: Compare complaints between credit cards and personal loans
questions.expected_answer: Credit cards have more billing and fraud complaints, while personal loans have more interest and fee complaints

questions.question: What customer service issues are mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: Customer service issues include long wait times, unhelpful responses, and difficulty reaching support

questions.question: How do customers describe billing disputes?
questions.expected_answer: Customers describe billing disputes as incorrect charges, unauthorized transactions, and difficulty getting refunds
